name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
description: Increase your Strength or Dexterity by 1 (max 30). The Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage you deal always ignores Resistance. When you roll a 20 on the d20 for an attack roll, you deal extra damage equal to the ability score increased by this feat; the extra damage type matches the attack.
